g.text: Read CR spec, status OCID, and delete intent
Bind the OCI resource through explicit identifiers only
Resolve and persist the Object Storage namespace before mutation or delete
Validate the composite bucket identifier before delete or update
- The modeled update surface excludes storage tier and other
- Missing Secrets still allow completion, but Secret-delete
Submit OCI delete for Object Storage Bucket
Confirm bucket disappearance with follow-up GetBucket calls until the bucket is gone or not found.
Delete the owned connection Secret after bucket deletion is confirmed.
Remove the finalizer after OCI deletion is confirmed
Stay blocked until Secret cleanup succeeds or is absent
Request requeue and keep the finalizer
Return an unsuccessful terminal reconcile result
Compare live OCI state with the supported drift surface
Reject the change before any OCI mutation
Resolve and persist the bucket namespace before update or delete.
Validate the composite bucket identifier before any OCI mutation.
Diff only the modeled bucket attributes before calling UpdateBucket.
Apply only the supported in-place update surface
Return success for the usable active state
Block successful completion until Secret sync succeeds
